name: Fido's Rewards
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup hot water or meat juices
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, pour the hot water over the margarine.
2. Stir in the powdered milk, salt and beaten egg.
3. Add the flour 1/2 cup at a time, mixing well after each addition.
4. Knead for 3 to 4 minutes, adding more flour if necessary to make a very stiff dough.
5. Pat or roll the dough to a thickness of 1/2 inch.
6. Cut into bone shapes and place on a greased baking sheet.
7. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 50 minutes.
8. Allow to cool and dry until hard.
Makes approximately 1 1/4 pounds.
Costs approximately $.25 per pound.
